falsification_attempt: Compared the old lib.rs txpool extension surface with v2.2 traits and Pool wrappers. Async result submission, metadata lookup, fulfilled-original replay, delivery-ready replay, and sender locking remain live; scheduled direct subpool insertion was replaced by payload/verifier scheduled obligation handling.
missed_risks: Old ritual_metrics::tx validation logging is not restored; this is observability loss, not an admission or ordering invariant in the current feature scope.
notes: Existing async_pool and PoolInner tests cover fulfilled replay, delivery-ready replay, and sender-lock admission; the new canonical commitment test covers the old async inclusion boundary.
